name: boltz-mcpb
description: Run Boltz biomolecular modeling workflows from Claude Desktop through the local boltz-api CLI.
long_description: Boltz wraps the local boltz-api CLI for structure prediction, molecular screening, binder design, result recovery, setup, and authentication. Workflow tools follow the same estimate-cost, start, and download-results flow as the Boltz Claude Code and Codex skill plugins.

tools.name: boltz_check_setup
tools.description: Check boltz-api availability, version, auth status, and output directory configuration.

tools.name: boltz_install_cli
tools.description: Install or update boltz-api using the official Boltz installer as an explicit setup action.

tools.name: boltz_auth_login
tools.description: Start boltz-api device-code authentication and return the login instructions from the CLI.

tools.name: boltz_structure_and_binding
tools.description: Estimate and optionally start one Boltz structure-and-binding job, then optionally launch result download.

tools.name: boltz_small_molecule_screen
tools.description: Estimate and optionally start one small-molecule library screen, then optionally launch result download.

tools.name: boltz_small_molecule_design
tools.description: Estimate and optionally start one small-molecule design job, then optionally launch result download.

tools.name: boltz_protein_screen
tools.description: Estimate and optionally start one protein-family screen, then optionally launch result download.

tools.name: boltz_protein_design
tools.description: Estimate and optionally start one protein design job, then optionally launch result download.

tools.name: boltz_download_results
tools.description: Start or resume boltz-api download-results for an existing job/run name.

tools.name: boltz_job_status
tools.description: Inspect local download-status, retrieve remote job status, or read a running downloader tail.

boltz_api_path.title: boltz-api executable
boltz_api_path.description: Path or command name for the Boltz CLI.

output_root.title: Boltz output directory
output_root.description: Directory where downloaded Boltz run artifacts are stored.

api_key.title: Boltz API key
api_key.description: Optional API key fallback. Leave blank to use boltz-api device-code authentication.

default_poll_interval_seconds.title: Default download poll interval
default_poll_interval_seconds.description: Seconds between download-results status checks when a workflow does not specify one.
